coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Just go easy and stay comfortable. Your aerobic system will thank you later.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Building your aerobic foundation. Consistency is key.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Fat oxidation zone - maximize mitochondrial efficiency at low intensity.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Keep it easy, maintain steady pace, build aerobic base.

coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: MAX EFFORT. Pretend the café is closing in 10 seconds.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Pure power! Recruit every muscle fiber you've got!
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Neuromuscular peak power. Phosphocreatine system at maximum.

coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Breathe. You'll need it for what comes next.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Active recovery. Let your body prepare for the next effort.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Recovery spin: partial PCr resynthesis and lactate clearance.

coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Easy spinning. Just don't fall asleep.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Active recovery enhances blood flow and promotes adaptation.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Low-intensity active recovery facilitates lactate clearance.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Keep it easy and enjoy the ride.
